title: Indiana solar company completes systems for Handsome Brook Farms
description: The Handsome Brook Farms facilities in Indiana, Ohio and Kentucky represent a 579.7-kilowatt portfolio that is expected to help the company’s partner producers reduce operating costs and build a more sustainable future.

title: Retired ag teachers establish Indiana Teach Ag Fund to support current ag educators
description:
